title: CO11 2SF, Mr Douglas Brown, Mrs Alison Brown, Mr Adam Brown & Mrs Joanne Brown: environmental permit issued - EPR/CP3407PD/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Mr Douglas Brown, Mrs Alison Brown, Mr Adam Brown & Mrs Joanne Brown Installation name: Treestacks Poultry Farm Permit number: EPR/CP3407PD/V004  "
